# socket.c send-side PKTINFO control-message assembly oracle (VERBATIM add_control_message
# + send_message cmsg build, real CMSG_* macros). Consumer Rust (socket). NO Python.
# CONST cmsghdr_len=16 cmsg_align_ip4=16 cmsg_space_ip4=32 cmsg_space_ip6=40

V4_NOIDX controllen=32 buf=1c000000000000000000000008000000000000000a0000010000000000000000
V4_ZERO controllen=32 buf=1c00000000000000000000000800000000000000000000000000000000000000
